mathematical_convention_checks.delta_wrap: delta in [0,360) is mapped to the equivalent NuFIT coordinate in [-180,180].
mathematical_convention_checks.jarlskog_sign: J = Im(U_e1 U_mu2 U_e2^* U_mu1^*) uses the PDG sign convention.
mathematical_convention_checks.normal_ordering_column_rule: Ascending eigenvalues are (m1,m2,m3); other column permutations change physical mass labels.
mathematical_convention_checks.takagi_relation: For U^T M U = D, the columns of U diagonalize M^dagger M.

scope.limitation: This enumeration cannot test the missing source map from f-labelled operator data to the charged-lepton mass basis.
scope.transformations: complex conjugation plus row and column permutations

TBoff-NO.atmospheric_treatment: IC23 without the tabulated Super-Kamiokande atmospheric likelihood

TByes-NO.atmospheric_treatment: IC24 with the tabulated Super-Kamiokande atmospheric likelihood
